name: golang-github-jacobsa-timeutil-dev
title: golang-github-jacobsa-timeutil-dev
description:
code supplementing Go's time package
This package contains code that supplements the time package from the Go
standard library. In particular:
.
* A Clock interface, with a fake implementation that can be used in tests.
* Implementations of oglematchers.Matcher for time values.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jacobsa-timeutil-dev because code supplementing Go's time package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jacobsa-timeutil-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jacobsa-timeutil-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jacobsa-timeutil-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
